SEOContent.what_is_text: Sorteo Pro is a free giveaway tool for influencers that allows you to pick random winners from unlimited lists for your Instagram or Wheel of Names contests. Unlike paid alternatives, it offers cryptographically secure selection, cinematic animations, and instant verification without requiring login.
SEOContent.feature_1_desc: Uses cryptographically secure random number generation to ensure fairness.
SEOContent.feature_2_desc: Choose from multiple themes like Slot Machine, Roulette, or Matrix to match your brand.
SEOContent.feature_3_desc: Cinematic animations and sound effects create excitement for your audience.
SEOContent.step_1: Enter participant names manually or paste a list.
SEOContent.step_2: Customize the look and feel using the visual editor.
SEOContent.step_3: Click 'Start' and watch the magic happen!
SEOContent.faq_1_answer: Yes, Sorteo Pro is completely free to use for all your giveaways.
SEOContent.faq_2_answer: Yes, your theme settings are saved locally in your browser.

WheelGeo.title: Wheel of Names & Random Picker
WheelGeo.description: Looking for a Wheel of Names? Sorteo Pro includes a fully customizable Random Name Picker Wheel that is fair, free, and fun.
WheelGeo.what_is_wheel: What is a Wheel of Names?
WheelGeo.what_is_wheel_answer: A Wheel of Names is a digital tool that picks a random winner by spinning a virtual wheel. It is popularly used by teachers, influencers, and event organizers for random selection. Sorteo Pro upgrades this experience with cinematic effects.

Glossary.title: Giveaway Glossary
Glossary.def_1: An algorithm that generates a sequence of numbers or symbols that cannot be reasonably predicted better than by random chance. Sorteo Pro uses cryptographically secure RNG.
Glossary.def_2: A system that allows players to verify that the outcome of a game or raffle was generated correctly and was not manipulated by the operator.
Glossary.def_3: A tool designed to select a random winner from the comments section of an Instagram post. Sorteo Pro offers a free alternative to these tools.

InstagramPicker.title: Free Instagram Comment Picker | Unlimited & No Login
InstagramPicker.description: Pick random winners from Instagram comments for free. No limits, no login required. The best alternative to paid tools.
InstagramPicker.subtitle: The fairest and easiest way to pick winners for your Instagram Giveaways.
InstagramPicker.direct_answer_title: What is an Instagram Comment Picker?
InstagramPicker.direct_answer_text: An Instagram Comment Picker is a tool that automatically selects a random winner from the comments of an Instagram post. Unlike other tools that charge for high comment counts, Sorteo Pro is 100% free and supports unlimited comments.
InstagramPicker.feature_1_desc: No hidden fees. Whether you have 100 or 100,000 comments, it's free.
InstagramPicker.feature_2_desc: We don't ask for your Instagram password or permissions. Just paste the list.
InstagramPicker.feature_3_desc: We use cryptographic algorithms to ensure the winner is truly random.
InstagramPicker.how_to_title: How to pick a winner from Instagram comments
InstagramPicker.step_1: Export your comments (using any free export tool).
InstagramPicker.step_2: Copy and paste the list of usernames into Sorteo Pro.
InstagramPicker.step_3: Click 'Start Giveaway' to pick a random winner.
InstagramPicker.faq_1_q: Is this Instagram Picker really free?
InstagramPicker.faq_1_a: Yes! We believe creators shouldn't pay to give back to their community.
InstagramPicker.faq_2_q: Is there a limit on comments?
InstagramPicker.faq_2_a: No limits. You can paste as many participants as you want.

WheelGeoPage.title: Wheel of Names | Random Name Picker (Free & Ad-Free)
WheelGeoPage.description: The best free Wheel of Names. Spin the wheel to pick a random winner. No ads, no login, and fully customizable themes.
WheelGeoPage.subtitle: Spin the wheel to make random decisions in style.
WheelGeoPage.direct_answer_title: What is a Wheel of Names?
WheelGeoPage.direct_answer_text: A Wheel of Names is a free online tool to pick a random name, number, or item. It is widely used by teachers for classrooms, raffles, and gamified decisions. Sorteo Pro offers a premium, ad-free experience with cinematic effects.
WheelGeoPage.faq_1_q: Is this Wheel of Names rigorous?
WheelGeoPage.faq_1_a: Yes, we use a cryptographically secure random number generator (CSPRNG) to ensure every spin is 100% random and unbiased.
WheelGeoPage.faq_2_a: Your lists and settings are automatically saved in your browser's local storage so you never lose them.

Versus.title: The Best AppSorteos Alternative for Instagram (Free & Unlimited)
Versus.description: Looking for an AppSorteos alternative? Sorteo Pro allows you to pick Instagram winners for free and without comment limits. 2024 Comparison.
Versus.header_desc: We analyze AppSorteos vs Sorteo Pro. Discover why thousands of users are switching.
Versus.direct_answer_title: What is the best free alternative to AppSorteos?
Versus.direct_answer_text: Sorteo Pro is the best free AppSorteos alternative for 2025. Unlike competitors that charge for high comment volumes, Sorteo Pro offers unlimited comments, no login requirements, and a verified certificate of validity, all for free.

why_us.title: Why are we better than free EasyPromos alternatives?
why_us.p1: Many creators look for 'free EasyPromos alternatives' because traditional tools have become too expensive. Sorteo Pro was born to break that barrier.
why_us.p2: Unlike the competition, we don't charge for your giveaway's success. If you have 10,000 comments, great! We don't penalize you for it.
why_us.title_2: The AppSorteos competitor that cares about your wallet
why_us.p3: Stop calculating how much your next giveaway will cost. With Sorteo Pro, your budget is zero.
why_us.direct_answer_title: What is the best free AppSorteos alternative?
why_us.direct_answer_text: The best free alternative to AppSorteos is Sorteo Pro. While AppSorteos charges for giveaways with more than 1,000 comments, Sorteo Pro allows unlimited comments completely free, without requiring login or subscriptions.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: Is there a free site like EasyPromos?
faq.a1: Yes, Sorteo Pro is the most robust free alternative to EasyPromos, offering certified winner selection without the high subscription costs.
faq.q2: Is it really free with no limits?
faq.a2: Absolutely. You can upload massive lists of participants and run unlimited giveaways without paying anything.
faq.q3: Do I need to sign up?
faq.a3: No. We respect your privacy and time. Enter and create your giveaway instantly.
